cluster_rule: No duplicate sites. No fragmented authority. No competing content clusters.

domains.intended_behavior: Main brand, canonical asset, framework, methodology, diagnostic system, and long-term strategic property.
allowed_use: publish canonical content
host the SXO framework and methodology
host the SuperSXO Score diagnostic tool
host the SXO audit offer
define and own all SXO doctrine
carry acquisition positioning
prohibited_use: create duplicate content that mirrors other cluster domains

domains.intended_behavior: Solution-oriented traffic, diagnostic offers, audit requests, reports, and future service/product pathways.
allowed_use: receive commercial and solution-intent traffic
present audit offer landing experiences
route to supersxo.com for authority content
operate as the commercial face of the cluster
prohibited_use: publish authority content that duplicates supersxo.com
create canonical content outside supersxo.com scope

domains.intended_behavior: Defensive and explanatory routing toward reference content on supersxo.com such as /what-is-sxo/ or /sxo-framework/.
allowed_use: redirect informational queries to supersxo.com
serve as a defensive registration preventing domain squatting

domains.intended_behavior: Defensive routing toward /sxo-audit/, /sxo-solution/, or equivalent commercial explanation pages on supersxo.com or sxosolution.com.
allowed_use: redirect solution-explanation queries to sxosolution.com
serve as defensive registration

domains.intended_behavior: Controlled routing for framework, score, methodology, and campaign links.
allowed_use: route campaign traffic to supersxo.com pages
controlled redirect for specific framework or score campaigns
link shortening for marketing and outreach
prohibited_use: serve as canonical domain for any content
operate independently of supersxo.com routing logic

domains.intended_behavior: Controlled routing for audit, report, diagnostic, and action-oriented links.
allowed_use: route action-intent traffic to sxosolution.com offers
controlled redirect for audit and report campaigns
link shortening for commercial outreach
prohibited_use: serve as canonical domain for any content
operate independently of sxosolution.com routing logic
